title: feat: Port property calculator to deployable Next.js web app
description:
Port property_calculator.tsx (Claude.ai artifact) to a standalone Next.js 15 web app deployable to Vercel.

Source: /home/duy/Downloads/property_calculator.tsx
Project: /home/duy/Projects/finance-dashboard/
Plan: /home/duy/.claude/plans/twinkly-pondering-papert.md

Scope:
- Scaffold Next.js 15 app with Tailwind
- Extract Section/Row/Slider shared components
- Port calculator logic to PropertyCalculator.tsx
- Make property address editable (not hardcoded)
- Keep all 4 tabs and slider interactivity intact
- Deploy to Vercel

Phase 2 (future): Integrate CompiledSanity xlsx dashboard
